name: Oyi Namul[cucumber Salad]
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons Sesame seeds, toasted and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumbers thinly and cut across into thin slices.
2. Place the sliced cucumbers in a bowl and sprinkle with the salt.
3. Add water to the cucumbers and let them sit for 15 minutes.
4. Drain off all liquid from the cucumbers.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients (mild vinegar, sugar, cayenne pepper, minced garlic, spring onion, toasted sesame seeds) in a separate bowl.
6. Pour the mixture over the cucumbers and mix well.
7. Serve chilled.
